name: AutoWebinar Funnel (Evergreen Webinar)
origin: Takes a PROVEN live webinar recording and runs it 24/7. Registrants pick a future start time or watch 'yesterday's replay' immediately. Watch-time tracking triggers segmented follow-up. Brunson notes two of his auto-webinars each produced over $1M.

whenToUse.summary: Use to scale a webinar that has ALREADY converted live — run the recording evergreen 24/7 with just-in-time sessions, watch-time segmentation, and an automated cart-close per registrant.
goals: Sell the same offer continuously without presenting live each time
Scale paid cold/warm traffic to a hands-off selling event
Segment and follow up by watch behavior (watched-to-end, left-early, no-show)
signals: A live Perfect Webinar has already proven conversion
High, steady traffic volume to feed sessions
Wants per-lead deadline funnels rather than one global cart close
antiSignals: No proven live webinar yet (run live first)
Offer/price changes frequently (evergreen recording goes stale)
One-time event with fixed date (use Live Webinar)

pageStructure.purpose: Register the visitor and offer immediate or near-future session times.
keyElements: Curiosity Big-Promise headline (same as proven live)
Session-time picker: next just-in-time sessions + 'watch the one starting in 15 min'

pageStructure.purpose: Confirm the chosen session and maximize show-up rate.
Play the evergreen recording as a simulated-live event and track watch time.
keyElements: Embedded recording (YouTube/Vimeo/auto-webinar platform) running as simulated live
Buy button revealed at the same timestamp the Stack begins

pageStructure.purpose: Present the order with the Stack and a per-lead deadline.
keyElements: Evergreen deadline countdown (per-lead, e.g. 48h from registration)

pageStructure.purpose: Run different follow-up per watch behavior to recover non-buyers.
keyElements: 3 Closes follow-up (emotion → logic → fear) tied to the per-lead deadline

scripts: Presentation = the proven Perfect Webinar recording (Intro → 3 Secrets → Stack → Close) — do NOT rewrite a converting recording
Segmented follow-up = 3 Closes (emotion/logic/fear) tied to the evergreen deadline
copyFramework.notes: Copy is reused from the winning live webinar. The new copywriting work is the per-lead deadline urgency and the watch-segment follow-up sequences.

ghlBuild.funnelType: Funnel (4 pages) + watch-time segmentation automations + email/SMS sequences
automations: Register → assign just-in-time session + reminder sequence
Watch-time tracking → tags (no-show / left-early / watched-end / watched-no-buy)
Purchase → fulfillment + exit all sales sequences
ghlBuild.notes: Skill 6 builds 4 pages with the simulated-live recording and per-lead deadline logic; Skill 44 generates the session selector, reminder widgets, order form + bump, and the evergreen countdown. The 5th 'page' is the segmented follow-up automation, not a funnel page.
